name: Stepper
description: A step indicator for multi-step workflows showing numbered circles connected by lines, with distinct visual states for completed, active, and upcoming steps.

horizontal.description: Inline horizontal stepper with numbered circles and labels below, connected by lines — the standard layout for checkout flows, onboarding wizards, and form sequences

vertical.description: Vertical sidebar stepper with numbered circles and labels beside them, connected by vertical lines — ideal for long multi-step processes with step descriptions

minimal.description: Compact dot-only stepper without labels or numbers, showing progress as a row of small filled and outlined circles — suited for image carousels and compact wizard headers

visual_brief: A sequence of numbered circles connected by lines representing workflow progress. In the horizontal preset: circles are 36px diameter, arranged in a horizontal row with equal spacing, centered within the container. Each circle is connected to the next by a horizontal line (2px height) that runs from the right edge of one circle to the left edge of the next. Completed steps render as filled accent-colored circles (background: accent) with a white checkmark SVG icon (2px stroke, 16px size) replacing the number. The connector line following a completed step is solid accent color. The active step renders as a filled accent circle with the step number in white (text-sm, font-bold), plus a pulsing ring animation — a 44px ring in accent color at 20% opacity that scales from 1.0 to 1.3 and fades out over 2s, repeating infinitely. The connector line before the active step is solid accent; after it is dashed in border-muted color. Upcoming steps render as circles with a 2px border in border-muted color (no fill, transparent background) with the step number in text-muted color. Connectors between upcoming steps are 2px dashed lines in border-muted. Labels appear centered below each circle in horizontal mode: step name in text-sm (completed and active: text-default font-medium, upcoming: text-muted). In the vertical preset: circles are 32px diameter, arranged in a vertical column. Connectors are vertical lines (2px wide, 32px tall) running from the bottom of one circle to the top of the next, centered horizontally with the circles. Labels appear to the right of each circle (12px left margin): step name (text-sm, font-medium) on the first line, optional step description (text-xs, text-muted, max-width: 200px) on the second line. The vertical preset works well as a left sidebar with step descriptions providing additional context. In the minimal preset: circles are reduced to 10px diameter dots with no numbers or labels. Completed dots are filled accent. Active dot is filled accent with a subtle scale(1.2) and glow. Upcoming dots are 2px outlined in border-muted. No connector lines — just 8px gaps between dots. The entire stepper is centered.

layout_hints.note: The horizontal stepper is typically placed at the top of a multi-step form, spanning the full content width. The vertical stepper is placed in a left sidebar (200–280px wide). The minimal stepper is centered below or above the step content. Do not wrap in a card unless the stepper is part of a larger card component.
layout_hints.connector_alignment: Horizontal connectors MUST align vertically centered with the step circles. The connector starts at the right edge of circle N and ends at the left edge of circle N+1. Use flex layout with the connector as a flex-1 element between step items.
layout_hints.step_states: Three states: completed (accent fill, white check), active (accent fill, white number, pulse ring), upcoming (muted border, muted number). The active step should always be visually prominent.
layout_hints.click_behavior: Completed steps MAY be clickable to allow navigating back. Active step is not clickable. Upcoming steps are not clickable unless the workflow allows skipping.

slots.step-list: The outer container for all steps and connectors. Horizontal preset: display flex, align-items: flex-start, justify-content: space-between, width: 100%. Each StepItem is a flex column (align-items center) and StepConnectors are flex-1 elements between items. Vertical preset: display flex, flex-direction: column, gap: 0, width: fit-content. Each StepItem is a flex row and connectors are vertical segments. Minimal preset: display flex, align-items: center, justify-content: center, gap: 8px. The list has role='list' and aria-label='Progress steps'.
slots.step-item: Repeating slot — one per workflow step. Contains the circle icon and label. Horizontal: flex column, align-items center, min-width: 80px. The circle is on top, label below with 8px gap. Vertical: flex row, align-items: flex-start, gap: 12px. The circle is on the left, label column on the right. Minimal: just the dot, no label. Each step item has aria-current='step' for the active step. Completed steps have a clickable wrapper (cursor: pointer, role='link') if back-navigation is enabled. Upcoming steps have aria-disabled='true'. The step item manages its own visual state (completed, active, upcoming) based on the current step index.
slots.step-icon: The numbered circle for each step. Size: 36px diameter (horizontal), 32px (vertical), 10px (minimal). Completed state: background accent, border: none. Contains a white checkmark SVG icon (viewBox 0 0 16 16, path with 2px stroke, stroke-linecap round, stroke-linejoin round, no fill). Active state: background accent, border: none. Contains the step number (1, 2, 3...) in white, text-sm (horizontal) or text-xs (vertical), font-bold, centered. Additionally has a pulsing ring — a pseudo-element or sibling div, 44px diameter (horizontal) or 40px (vertical), border: 2px solid accent at 20% opacity, border-radius-full, positioned centered behind the circle. The ring animates: scale 1→1.3 + opacity 0.2→0 over 2s ease-out, infinite. Upcoming state: background transparent, border: 2px solid border-muted. Contains the step number in text-muted color. Minimal preset: all states are 10px circles — completed: filled accent, active: filled accent with box-shadow 0 0 0 3px accent-20%, upcoming: border 2px solid border-muted with transparent fill. Transition between states: background-color + border-color 300ms ease.
slots.step-connector: The line segment connecting adjacent step circles. Horizontal: height 2px, flex: 1, margin-top: 18px (to vertically center with 36px circles), margin-left and margin-right: 0 (connects flush to circles). Vertical: width 2px, height: 32px, margin-left: 15px (to horizontally center with 32px circles). Between completed steps: solid line, background accent. Between completed and active: solid line, background accent. Between active and upcoming: dashed line (4px dash, 4px gap via background-image repeating-linear-gradient or SVG), color border-muted. Between upcoming steps: dashed line, color border-muted. Minimal preset: no connectors. Transition: background-color 300ms ease when a step completes.
slots.step-label: The text label for each step. Horizontal: centered below the circle, margin-top 8px. Text: step name in text-sm. Completed and active: text-default, font-medium. Upcoming: text-muted, font-normal. Max-width: 100px, text-align center, word-wrap for long names. Vertical: positioned to the right of the circle. Step name: text-sm, font-medium (completed/active: text-default, upcoming: text-muted). Optional description on the next line: text-xs, text-muted, max-width 200px, line-clamp: 2. Gap between name and description: 2px. Minimal preset: no labels rendered.

keyboard: Tab: move focus between clickable completed steps
Enter: navigate to a completed step (if back-navigation enabled)
Arrow Left/Up: focus previous step (if navigable)
Arrow Right/Down: focus next step (if navigable)

responsive.mobile: Horizontal preset collapses to show only the active step circle with label, plus small dots for other steps (like minimal preset) if more than 4 steps. Vertical preset remains full but with reduced label max-width (140px). Minimal preset stays the same. Step circles reduce to 32px horizontal. Connector lines shorten.
responsive.tablet: Horizontal preset shows all steps with labels truncated to 80px max-width. Vertical preset renders fully with descriptions. Circle size remains standard. Touch targets for clickable completed steps are 44px minimum.
responsive.desktop: Full stepper with all labels visible. Horizontal labels can expand to 120px. Vertical descriptions show up to 2 lines. Hover effects on clickable completed steps (scale 1.05 on the circle, underline on label). Pulse animation on active step is smooth at 60fps.

micro.step-hover: scale 1→1.05 on circle, 150ms ease (completed steps only)

transitions.step-complete: circle background color muted→accent 300ms ease + number fades out and checkmark fades in 200ms + connector color muted→accent 300ms ease
transitions.step-activate: circle background color muted→accent 300ms ease + pulse ring begins

ambient.active-pulse: ring scale 1→1.3 + opacity 0.2→0, 2s ease-out infinite on the active step
